upgrade_source: Wikipedia (DeKalb Avenue station BMT lines); MTA capital program records
notes: Major overhaul 2004-2006 designed by architect Lee Harris Pomeroy. Three elevators installed: one street-to-mezzanine on SE corner of DeKalb Ave and Flatbush Ave, two mezzanine-to-platform. $36 million renovation project. Using 2005 as midpoint of 2004-2006 construction period.
